overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character exploring an ancient Greek coastal village at night. The character walks along sandy beaches, through a harbor with wooden scaffolding and beached triremes, under a covered dock structure, swims in the harbor waters, and exits onto a stone pathway.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with rocky coastal outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach toward the distant harbor village

entered.detail: expansive sand beach along the coastline
tall rocky cliffs forming the coastline backdrop
wooden sailboat with large sail near the shore
rock formations extending into the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide sandy beach at night, with rocky cliffs to the left and an ancient sailboat visible in the water ahead. The scene is open and empty, with moonlight illuminating the coastal landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient Greek harbor with wooden scaffolding and beached ships

ancient Greek warship hull beached on the sand
large stone building with wooden roof structure
cluster of wooden structures and houses

segments.scene_description: The character enters a harbor village with wooden scaffolding and beached ships scattered across the sand. Stone warehouses and wooden buildings line the right side, while a villager walks near the scaffolding on the left. Torchlight mixes with moonlight in this semi-covered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden dock with thatched roof

events.description: entering covered wooden dock structure with thatched roof

agents.ego_description: walking under the thatched roof of the dock market area

elevated wooden plank walkway over sand
wooden table with goods for sale
fishing nets hanging from wooden posts

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a thatched roof structure covering a wooden dock. Market tables and hanging fish nets line the path, with the lighting becoming darker and more sheltered from the open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor front with stone walls and wooden ships

events.description: exiting covered dock into open harbor front area
character enters the water and begins swimming

agents.ego_description: walking past villagers along the shore and entering the harbor water

notable_agents.action: villager walking along the sandy shore near the boats

entered.detail: low stone wall lining the harbor edge
small wooden boats beached on the sand
large wooden crane structure for loading ships

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered dock, the character enters the open harbor front with stone walls and beached fishing boats. Villagers walk along the shore near a large wooden crane structure. The character continues walking and enters the water to begin swimming.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor water and stone pathway exit

events.description: exiting water onto stone pathway along the harbor

agents.ego_description: swimming through the harbor water around wooden posts, then climbing out onto a stone path

entered.detail: wooden posts and pylons in the water
cobblestone path along the harbor edge
large stone building with columns and torchlight

segments.scene_description: The character swims through the harbor water, passing wooden posts and submerged structures. After swimming, the character climbs onto a stone pathway running alongside an ancient stone building with warm torchlight, continuing along the harbor edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, moonlit beach into the sheltered depths of a harbor village before ending along a torchlit stone waterfront. It begins with the character walking across a wide sandy expanse flanked by rocky cliffs, moving toward an ancient sailboat anchored in the distance. As the character enters the village, the open landscape shifts into a semi-covered harbor filled with wooden scaffolding, beached ships, and stone warehouses illuminated by a mix of moonlight and torchfire. The scene then narrows as the camera follows the character under a thatched roof structure lined with market tables and fishing nets, before expanding again into the open harbor front where villagers gather near a large wooden crane. Finally, the character transitions from the shore into the harbor waters, swimming past submerged posts before climbing onto a stone pathway that runs alongside an ancient building bathed in warm light.
